title: Cloud Guard Problem: VCN Flow Log Disabled
description: Detects Cloud Guard reporting problem: VCN_Flow_Log_Disabled.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Problems' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Logs') and (('Problem Name' = 'VCN_Flow_Log_Disabled'))
